message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker state

Update beads issue database with completed work:

- bd-2qbx.2: Tooltip Widget - Implemented contextual tooltip system

Status updates:
- Multiple in-progress items across visual FX, modal, reflow,
  and form validation epics reflecting concurrent agent work

Dependency graph reflects:
- bd-2qbx.2 completion unblocks bd-2qbx.4 (Guided Tour System)
- Progress on bd-34pj (Form Validation) epic subtasks
- Ongoing work on bd-l8x9 (Visual FX Modularization)
- Active bd-1rz0 (Responsive Reflow) implementation
